title: decussocarpus minus
intro: Decussocarpus minus, also known as the ferny wood fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Dicksoniaceae and is native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Decussocarpus minus include reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and rhizomes can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions.
